title: Remixed Origins
description: Adds 7 new origins, integrates Icarus, adds Pehkui, and Gravity Changer! (qouteall fork)
body:
A simple origins addon that adds 7 new origins.

<details>
<summary>Full Origin List:</summary>

- Wall-Walker: A race of gravity controlling humanoids. Not very different from humans.

- Grounded Elytrian: A alternate version of the Elytrian that swaps it's debuffs for water weakness and a weaker body.

- The Fearful: A race of small human-like creatures. They strike hard but have a weak body, when hit they counteract this by randomly teleporting. They also follow a vegetarian diet. 1.5 blocks tall.

- Frost Golem: A creature made of snow, very easy to melt. Immune to freezing.

- Undead: A zombie-like creature with flesh that rots and burns under the sun.

- Sculk-Born: A creature from the depths, they can only sleep in negative Y values and apply debuffs on hit. They also follow a carnivorous diet. Slightly shorter than the normal player.

- Half-Dragon: Part human, part dragon. These creatures have wings capable of flight, and must be kept warm with fresh air to sleep, if not warm, they will freeze. Able to mine stone with their hands. 2.5 blocks tall.

This mod also applies height changes to the Arachnid and Enderian, making them 1.5 and 2.5 blocks tall in that order. And, it gives the elytrian Icarus wings.

</details>

Requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) (obviously), [Gravity Changer (qouteall fork)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork), [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), and [Icarus](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarus)
